zh.lifeSummary: 當Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I於大約1078年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾時，他的父親Guillaume II Comte d'Eu11076歲，母親Beatrice de Busli5歲。他於1114年之後與Margaret Sully在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1140年7月12日在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特享年63歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I于大约1078年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利艾时，他的父亲Guillaume II Comte d'Eu11076岁，母亲Beatrice de Busli5岁。他于1114年之后与Margaret Sully在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利艾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1140年7月12日在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特享年63岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利福卡爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

variants.name: Deb
meanings: Indian (northeastern states): variant of   Deo  , found among Kayasthas.

variants.name: Dev
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I was born about 1078, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume II Comte d'Eu, was 11076 and his mother, Beatrice de Busli, was 5. He married Margaret Sully after 1114, in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 July 1140, in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 63, and was buried in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Comte d’Eu Henry d'Eu I est né environ 1078, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume II Comte d'Eu, avait 11076 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Busli, avait 5 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sully après 1114, à Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1140, à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I um 1078 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume II Comte d'Eu 11076 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Busli 5. Er hat nach 1114 in Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Margaret Sully geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1140 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I è nato il circa 1078 nel Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume II Comte d'Eu, aveva 11076 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Busli, aveva 5 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sully dopo il 1114, nel Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1140, nel Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu Iが約1078年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウで生まれた時，父Guillaume II Comte d'Euは11076歳，母Beatrice de Busliは5歳であった。1114年以後にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメエウでMargaret Sullyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1140年7月12日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントで63歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメフォウカーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I(이)가 대략 1078년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume II Comte d'Eu(은)는 11076세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Busli(은)는 5세였다. 그는 1114년 이후 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 우에서 Margaret Sully(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1140년 7월 12일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 포우카몽에 묻혔다.

mn.Ulcombe, Kent, England: Ulcombe, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume II Comte d'Eu, tinha 11076 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Busli, tinha 5 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sully após 1114, em Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1140, em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I родился около 1078 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume II Comte d'Eu было 11076 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Busli, 5. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sully после 1114 г. в местности эу, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 июля 1140 г. в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности фоукармонт, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция.

sm.from 1096 to 1140: mai le 1096 e o'o I le 1140

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Comte de Eu Henry d'Eu I nació aproximadamente 1078, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume II Comte d'Eu, tenía 11076 años y su mamá, Beatrice de Busli, tenía 5 años. Se casó con Margaret Sully después de 1114, en Eu, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1140, en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Foucarmont, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
